top_signals.title: AI, Iran War Risks Weigh on Indian IT Firms’ Earnings Outlook
top_signals.summary: HCL Technologies Ltd., Wipro Ltd. and Tech Mahindra Ltd. are set to report earnings as their investor base increasingly questions the value of traditional IT services in the age of artificial intelligence.

top_signals.title: Summit at Sea Level to Accelerate Coastal Resilience in Louisiana
top_signals.summary: The Louisiana Coastal Protection and Restoration Authority (CPRA), the Louisiana Department of Transportation and Development (DOTD), and the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers (USACE) have agreed to a joint commitment to overhaul bureaucratic processes…
